completed: Hardened backend data consistency with Mongoose Transactions across all critical controllers (Faculty, Batch, Approval, Class, Student, and Import modules).
Enabled cross-instance real-time synchronization using MongoDB Change Streams and SSE.
Refactored status recalculation and batch synchronization logic to be session-aware.
Eliminated dependency on Redis by leveraging native MongoDB features.
in_progress: Final verification and load testing of transactional overhead.
Observing production logs on Render for any transaction-related timeouts under high concurrency.
pending: Reduce cache TTLs in server/src/config/cache.js to 5-10 seconds to further mitigate stale data issues.
Implement specific cache invalidation triggers based on Change Stream events.

decisions.context: Multi-instance server environment on Render causing data inconsistency.
decisions.decision: Implemented MongoDB Change Streams to broadcast SSE updates globally across all node instances, ensuring silent background sync without requiring Redis.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds slight overhead to MongoDB (Oplog pressure) but simplifies infrastructure and eliminates Redis management/costs.

decisions.context: Ensuring data integrity for complex academic management operations.
decisions.decision: Applied mandatory Mongoose Transactions to all write-heavy controllers.
decisions.trade_offs: Increases latency slightly for write operations but guarantees ACID compliance and state consistency.
